signals.headline: Solana Overtakes Ethereum in Stablecoin Volume for Second Time, Hits Record Supply Amid Developer Platform Launch | YES
signals.raw:
Solana Overtakes Ethereum in Stablecoin Volume for Second Time, Hits Record Supply Amid Developer Platform Launch | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Solana captured 32.6% of weekly adjusted USD stablecoin volume ending April 12 (vs. Ethereum's 27.8%), with stablecoin supply reaching a record $16.3B, up 10.87% in the past week—far outpacing Ethereum's 0.63% growth—driven by low fees and fast finality.[1]

signals.headline: SOUTH KOREA ANNUAL INFLATION RISES TO 2
signals.raw:
SOUTH KOREA ANNUAL INFLATION RISES TO 2.2% IN MARCH 2026 | NO | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, below market forecasts of 2.4% and still near the Bank of Korea's 2% target.[2]  
This recent data release on or around April 2026 confirms contained price pressures amid global energy volatility, unlikely to sign
